title: Ultra Realistic Low Angle Beach Motion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Low Angle Beach Motion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic beach motion portrait of young adult woman with fair natural skin tone and lively smile running happily toward the camera. Subject: young adult woman with fair natural skin tone and lively smile has fair natural skin tone, real skin texture, lively smile, natural human presence, coral swimwear, and specific outer layer variant with readable visual details. Scene: Real beach background with ocean waves, sand, sky, natural coastline, small flying sand or water splash, sea breeze, and joyful summer atmosphere. Composition: Extreme low-angle shot from near sand or shallow water; Signature Elements: one foot stepping forward into the foreground with partially visible sole supplies the swappable motion detail detail for this template. Preserved ultra realistic low angle beach motion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Candid ultra-realistic beach photography with joyful motion, real skin texture, natural hair physics, strong perspective, clean human presence, and non-CGI summer editorial finish. Color Palette: Natural beach blues, warm sand tones, fair skin tones, selected swimwear color, outer-layer accents, white water highlights, and bright summer daylight. Lighting: Natural beach daylight with clean skin exposure, moving hair and fabric highlights, realistic water sparkle, soft coastal bounce light, and sharp motion-focused visibility. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
